# Nzom Labs

> Saudi technology studio building enterprise SaaS systems for operations, compliance, governance, and workflow management. Bilingual (Arabic/English) products tailored for Saudi organizations.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Nzom Labs and its product ecosystem.
- [About](/about): Company story, mission, and approach to building enterprise SaaS.
- [Contact](/contact): Request a demo, book a consultation, or reach the sales team.
- [Blog](/blog): Insights on digital transformation, compliance, and enterprise tech in Saudi Arabia.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about Nzom Labs systems, pricing, and support.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How Nzom Labs collects, uses, and protects data.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms): Terms of use for Nzom Labs services and platforms.

## Products

- [Zerisks (HSSE)](/products/hsse): Digital safety, health, security, and environment management system.
- [aldalyel (Legal)](/products/legal): AI-powered legal case and document management for law teams.
- [Nexdo (Tasks)](/products/tasks): Project and task management built to eliminate operational chaos.
- [Nzom Booking](/products/booking): Professional appointment and booking system for service businesses.
- [Customers Relation Managments (CRM)](/products/crm): Multi-tenant CRM covering contacts, deals, leads, and pipelines.

## Blog highlights

- [Why your organization needs a digital safety system](/blog/why-your-organization-needs-digital-safety-system)
- [AI-powered legal case management](/blog/ai-powered-legal-case-management)
- [ZATCA e-invoicing: everything you need to know](/blog/zatca-e-invoicing-everything-you-need-to-know)
